description: Black handbag with synthetic leather trims in brown with animal print, belt with a twist clasp on the front, two short handles woven through metallic rings for carrying ease, two metallic brand badges hanging from the handles, synthetic leather trims interwoven through the exterior on the front for style, an inside flap with press buttoned closure with one main slot, an organiser sleeve and a zipped pocket on the inner sides, one external zipped pocket at the back
